violations.description: EMPLOYEE HYGIENE (5 pts): Observed empolyee not wash hands when required.
COOKING POTENTIALLY HAZARDOUS FOOD (5 pts): Potentially hazardous food noted not being cooked adequately.
CROSS CONTAMINATION (5 pts): Raw meat noted being stored above food not to be further cooked. Beef fish egg whites provolone cheese and sliced tomatoes co-mingiling in the prep top cooler.
SANITIZATION OF EQUIP. AND UTENSILS (4 pts): An inadequate amount of chlorine sanitizer was noted in the final rinse of the kitchen dish machine.

FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (2 pts): Observed interior surfaces of prep top cooler & upright freezer with debris build up. Meat slicer stand mixer spatulas and butter roller have not been cleaned at the end of use or every 4 hours during uses.
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (1 pts): Equipment exteriors including freezer door handles counter top oven handles and exterior shelf above range and flat top noted not clean.
VENTILATION HOOD SYSTEM (1 pts): Vent hood filters above cookline noted with heavy debris build up above char broiler and deep fryers specifically.
SANITIZATION OF EQUIP. AND UTENSILS (4 pts): An inadequate amount of chlorine sanitizer was noted in the final rinse of the dish machine.
CONTAMINATION FROM WIPING CLOTHS (2 pts): Wiping cloths noted laying on counter in kitchen.
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (1 pts): Equipment exteriors shelving areas around food prep spaces noted not clean.
IN-USE UTENSILS (1 pts): In use utensils were noted being stored or contacting unclean surfaces. Observed spatula laying on prep sink side table next to the deep fryers.
